# Project Progress Report

**Report Date**: March 30, 2026
**Project**: Kenya IEBC-Inspired Blockchain Voting Platform
**Repository**: `voting-system`
**Total Commits**: 4
**Report Generated By**: AgentsOrchestrator (Explore + Senior PM + Product Manager)

---

## Executive Summary

The Blockchain Voting System is **52% complete** by task count with strong foundational code but significant integration and operational gaps. The backend (~85%), smart contracts (100%), and frontend UI (~80%) are substantially built. However, the system is **not runnable end-to-end** due to missing frontend-backend wiring, database migrations, and deployment scripts.

**Key Metrics**:

```
Tasks Completed:     43 / 82    (52%)
Backend Code:        ~85%       (all modules implemented)
Smart Contracts:     100%       (1,278 lines Solidity)
Frontend Code:       ~80%       (21 pages, 14 components)
Infrastructure:      ~62%       (Docker + K8s done, scripts missing)
Testing:             ~30%       (unit tests done, integration/E2E missing)
Documentation:       ~70%       (core docs expanded, user guides missing)
```

---

## What Has Been Finished

### 1. Architecture & Design — 100% ✅

All planning and design work is complete:

- **README.md** — 138 lines: project overview, features, tech stack, architecture diagram
- **DESIGN.md** — 490 lines: hybrid blockchain architecture, smart group voting, cryptography, data flow, consensus mechanism, scalability, compliance
- **docs/ux-research-report.md** — Full UX research with personas, pain points, journey maps
- **docs/ui-design-system.md** — Complete design system specification
- **frontend/TECHNICAL_FOUNDATION.md** — 2,884 lines of technical architecture (CSS system, component library, state management, type definitions, layouts, responsive design, theme system, accessibility)
- **docs/project-phases.md** — 8-phase, 40-week project plan with deliverables and acceptance criteria

### 2. Backend Implementation — 85% ✅

All 9 NestJS modules are fully implemented with controllers, services, DTOs, and entities:

| Module | Files | Key Features |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| **Auth** | Controller, Service, Guards, DTOs | Multi-user-type login (voter/RO/admin), JWT, MFA, session management, Argon2 hashing |
| **Voter** | Controller, Service, DTOs | Registration, biometric enrollment, profile management, status tracking |
| **Candidate** | Controller, Service, DTOs | CRUD, approval workflow, filtering by position/county/status |
| **Vote** | Controller, Service, DTOs | Ballot retrieval, vote casting with encryption, ZK proofs, confirmation numbers |
| **Batch** | Controller, Service, DTOs | Smart Group-Based Voting (1,000 voters/batch, 120s idle timeout) |
| **Admin** | Controller, Service, DTOs | County management, RO applications, presidential candidates |
| **Reporting** | Controller, Service | Election results, turnout stats, audit reports, blockchain status |
| **Health** | Controller | Liveness, readiness, combined health probes for K8s |
| **Blockchain** | Service (1,319 lines) | Web3/Hyperledger Besu integration, HSM, transaction retry, nonce management |

**Database**: 17 TypeORM entities covering the complete domain model (Voter, Candidate, Vote, Election, Batch, Session, AuditLog, County, Constituency, Ward, etc.)

**Security**: JWT auth guard, role-based access control (4 roles), MFA guard, rate limiting, custom validators (@IsNationalId, @IsKenyaPhone, @IsStrongPassword), exception filters, logging interceptor

**Seeds**: Complete seed data for 47 counties, 290 constituencies, 1,450 wards, plus test voters, candidates, and elections

### 3. Smart Contracts — 100% ✅

- **VoteContract.sol** — 605 lines (OpenZeppelin: AccessControl, ReentrancyGuard, Pausable)
- **ElectionKeyManager.sol** — 673 lines
- Contract ABIs generated and ready
- Hardhat configuration with deploy scripts
- Contract tests: 439 lines (VoteContract.js 217 lines, ElectionKeyManager.js 222 lines)

### 4. Frontend Implementation — 80% ✅

**21 page routes** implemented:

| Section | Pages | Status |
|---------|-------|--------|
| **Public** | Landing page (317 lines) | ✅ Done |
| **Auth** | Login, Register | ✅ Done |
| **Voter** | Dashboard, Registration (399 lines), Vote (288 lines) | ✅ Done (Vote uses mock data) |
| **Admin** | Dashboard, Elections, Counties, Candidates, RO Management, Settings | ✅ Done |
| **RO** | Dashboard, Candidates, Voters | ✅ Done |

**Component Library**: 15+ reusable UI components (Button, Input, Card, Alert, Select, Modal, Badge, Avatar, DataTable, StatCard, StepIndicator, Progress, Skeleton, Toast, Dropdown)

**State Management**: 4 Zustand stores (auth, voting, voter-registration, theme)

**API Layer**: 8 service modules with Axios client (interceptors, auto token refresh)

**Custom Hooks**: 7 hooks (useAuth, useVoting, useRegistration, useElectionCountdown, useDebounce, useMediaQuery, useLocalStorage)

### 5. Infrastructure — 90% ✅

**Docker**:
- Backend Dockerfile — 108 lines (multi-stage, nginx, health checks, non-root user)
- Frontend Dockerfile — 116 lines (multi-stage, standalone Next.js output)
- docker-compose.yml — 177 lines (PostgreSQL 16, Redis 7, RabbitMQ 3, Backend, Frontend)

**Kubernetes** (13 manifest files):
- Backend: Deployment (3 replicas), HPA (CPU 70%, memory 80%), ConfigMap
- Frontend: Deployment (3 replicas), ConfigMap
- Database: PostgreSQL StatefulSet with PVC, Redis Deployment
- RabbitMQ: Deployment with persistence
- Ingress: NGINX with TLS, rate limiting, path-based routing
- Secrets & ConfigMaps: Centralized configuration management
- Kustomization: Labels, namespace, replica management

### 6. Unit Tests — 75% ✅

120+ backend unit tests across 6 modules:
- auth.service.spec.ts — 388 lines
- voter.service.spec.ts — 438 lines
- candidate.service.spec.ts — 473 lines
- vote.service.spec.ts — 441 lines
- admin.service.spec.ts — 472 lines
- batch.service.spec.ts — 359 lines

Frontend component and store tests:

- Input.spec.tsx — 207 lines
- Card.spec.tsx — 326 lines
- Alert.spec.tsx — 54 lines
- auth.store.spec.ts — 399 lines
- voting.store.spec.ts — 586 lines

## What Remains

### Critical Path (Must Complete for MVP)

| # | Task | Section | Why It Matters |
|---|------|---------|----------------|
| 1 | Database Migrations (1.3.7) | Scripts | Cannot deploy schema without versioned migrations |
| 2 | Frontend-Backend Wiring | Integration | Pages use mock data; system can't run end-to-end |
| 3 | Backend Integration Tests (2.2.1-2.2.5) | Testing | Untested with real database |
| 4 | Build Script (1.5.2) | Scripts | No way to compile production builds |
| 5 | Deployment Script (1.5.3) | Scripts | No way to deploy to any environment |
| 6 | Environment Setup Script (1.5.1) | Scripts | No automated environment configuration |
| 7 | E2E Voting Flow Tests (2.4.1-2.4.3) | Testing | Core voting loop unvalidated |

## Risks & Blockers

### HIGH RISK

| Risk | Description | Mitigation |
|------|-------------|------------|
| **Frontend-Backend Integration Gap** | Vote page and other pages use hardcoded mock data. The voting flow cannot be verified end-to-end. | Replace mock data with API service calls. Wire all pages to backend endpoints. |
| **No Database Migrations** | Seed scripts exist but zero TypeORM migration files. Schema cannot be version-controlled or deployed. | Generate initial migration from entities. Create migration runner script. |
| **Biometric Authentication Stub** | Spec requires face + fingerprint MFA. Frontend has biometrics.ts service (398 lines) but no hardware integration. | Integrate WebAuthn/biometric SDK. Implement liveness detection. |

### MEDIUM RISK

| Risk | Description | Mitigation |
|------|-------------|------------|
| **No Integration Tests** | Zero e2e-spec.ts files. System never tested with real database. | Write integration tests for auth, voter, voting, admin flows. |
| **Blockchain Network Not Deployed** | Smart contracts written but no running Besu node in docker-compose. | Add Besu service to docker-compose. Deploy contracts to local network. |
| **No Deployment Scripts** | Cannot build, deploy, or rollback without manual intervention. | Create shell scripts for build, deploy, rollback, migrate operations. |

### LOW RISK

| Risk | Description | Mitigation |
|------|-------------|------------|
| **Empty CLAUDE.md** | No project conventions persisted for AI-assisted development. | Populate with coding standards, architecture decisions, and patterns. |
| **Task List Reconciliation** | Some completed work (store tests, component tests) not marked in task list. | Update task list to reflect actual code state. |

## Recommended Next Sprint

**Sprint Goal**: Make the system runnable end-to-end

| Priority | Task | Effort | Owner |
|----------|------|--------|-------|
| P0 | Create database migrations (1.3.7) | Medium | Backend |
| P0 | Wire frontend pages to backend API | High | Frontend |
| P0 | Add Besu to docker-compose | Medium | DevOps |
| P1 | Write backend integration tests (2.2.x) | High | QA |
| P1 | Create build/deploy scripts (1.5.2-1.5.3) | Medium | DevOps |
| P1 | Expand E2E voting flow tests (2.4.1-2.4.3) | Medium | QA |
| P2 | Create environment setup script (1.5.1) | Low | DevOps |
| P2 | Production docker-compose (1.1.4) | Low | DevOps |

**Estimated Effort**: 2-3 sprints (4-6 weeks) to reach MVP-complete state.
